ogTitle: Kellys Plains vs Kellyville Ridge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kellys Plains and Kellyville Ridge.
heading: Kellys Plains vs Kellyville Ridge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kellys Plains, New South Wales and Kellyville Ridge, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kellys Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Kellyville Ridge (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kellys Plains or Kellyville Ridge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kellys Plains has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Kellyville Ridge scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kellys Plains scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Kellyville Ridge scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kellys Plains or Kellyville Ridge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kellys Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
